title: uragoga collina
intro: Uragoga collina, also known as the West Indian lemon grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Zingiberaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Uragoga collina include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Uragoga collina is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to treat various health conditions.
